subject: New Opening: Java Developer – Telecom/media
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Java Developer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • GCP
  • Kafka

Details:
Client: StreamNord
Start: 2023-05-17
Duration: 12 months
Location: Malmö (on-site)
Rate: competitive (details on request)

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
David Karlsson
Head of Staffing
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 70 890 12 34
